title: vitis forskahlii
intro: Vitis forskahlii, also known as the forskohlii plant, is a type of plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia and is a member of the grape family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to increase the production of cyclic AMP (cAMP), a molecule involved in various cellular processes. The health benefits of Vitis forskahlii include weight loss, improved bone density, and increased muscle mass, as well as potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Vitis forskahlii is typically prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, although it can also be consumed as a tea.
